decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; combined sodade-anchor + K-island narrative-style cascade + fixed-theme grammar + improvisation budget + multi-instrument parallel decoders + diaspora return-loop appears novel composition. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.86 / func 0.74-0.86 on cascade-routing + mixture-of-thoughts adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
